seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pelican Waters and Penwhaupell. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pelican Waters vs Penwhaupell: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pelican Waters and Penwhaupell.
heading: Pelican Waters vs Penwhaupell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pelican Waters, Queensland and Penwhaupell, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Penwhaupell has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Pelican Waters (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pelican Waters or Penwhaupell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pelican Waters has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Penwhaupell scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pelican Waters scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Penwhaupell scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pelican Waters or Penwhaupell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Penwhaupell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
